codeReview.summary: Most rotate-keyset completion screens and routes were implemented as described, but the happy-path terminal navigation does not reach Dashboard as required by VAL-ROTATEKS-007.

issues.description: RotateDistributionCompleteScreen routes Finish Distribution to "/" instead of Dashboard. Validation contract VAL-ROTATEKS-007 requires full happy path to end at Dashboard (form -> review -> progress -> profile -> distribute -> dashboard).

sharedStateObservations.observation: ui-builder skill requires test-first (including a failing test before implementation), but transcript order shows implementation edits before test edits while handoff skillFeedback still reports followedProcedure=true.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: worker-transcripts.jsonl session 2b8343c1-9be9-4407-ac9a-92c788bd2cb7: Edit calls for RotateKeysetScreens.tsx/global.css/App.tsx occur before Edit calls to src/screens/__tests__/RotateKeysetScreens.test.tsx.

summary: Feature is close, but fails acceptance due to incorrect final happy-path navigation target. The finish action currently returns to welcome root instead of Dashboard.
